overall.description: A first-person walk through a multi-lane urban tunnel at night in a video game (GTA V). The camera moves steadily along the right sidewalk as various vehicles pass by in both directions, transitioning from the concrete entrance section through a yellow-walled interior to the illuminated city exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane vehicular tunnel with concrete walls

events.description: black sports car passes by on the right, followed by a blue SUV

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right sidewalk of the tunnel near the entrance

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving past the camera heading deeper into the tunnel

entered.detail: grey concrete block walls with horizontal red stripe markings
overhead fluorescent tube lights illuminating the tunnel ceiling
asphalt road surface with yellow and red lane markings
large cylindrical metal pipes running along the tunnel ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a concrete vehicular tunnel with artificial overhead lighting. The camera walks along the right sidewalk as various cars including a black sports car and blue SUV pass by on the road. The tunnel walls are grey concrete with red horizontal stripes, and large ventilation pipes run along the curved ceiling.

events.description: passing an illuminated emergency exit door on the left wall
yellow taxi cab drives past heading toward the tunnel exit

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the tunnel sidewalk, passing emergency exits

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving past the camera toward the tunnel exit

entered.detail: metal door with illuminated exit sign and small window
rectangular metal ventilation grate on the lower wall section

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the tunnel, the camera passes an illuminated emergency exit door on the left wall and metal ventilation grates. A yellow taxi and other vehicles continue to pass by on the road. The concrete walls and overhead lighting remain consistent as the tunnel curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel section with yellow painted walls and graffiti

events.description: tunnel wall color changes from grey concrete to yellow painted surface
tunnel exit becomes visible ahead with city lights glowing in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the yellow-walled section of the tunnel approaching the exit

entered.detail: concrete walls painted yellow with red horizontal stripe markings
white painted graffiti tags on the yellow tunnel walls
arched tunnel exit opening with city lights visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The tunnel walls transition to a distinctive yellow paint with graffiti tags appearing on the right side. The camera continues walking as the tunnel exit becomes visible ahead, revealing the glow of city lights. Fewer vehicles are present in this section, and the lighting remains consistently artificial from the overhead fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel exit transition to urban street

events.description: ambient light increases significantly as the tunnel exit approaches
approaching the tunnel threshold where artificial lighting meets natural night lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward and approaching the tunnel exit with city lights visible ahead

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving out of the tunnel toward the city

entered.detail: urban buildings with illuminated windows visible through the tunnel exit
street lamps and building lights from the city outside the tunnel

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the tunnel exit with the night city skyline becoming clearly visible ahead. The lighting transitions from artificial tunnel lights to the mixed ambient glow of urban street lights. The camera continues walking toward the threshold where the enclosed tunnel opens to the city street, with vehicles still occasionally passing by on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a subterranean vehicular tunnel that gradually opens into a glowing night city skyline. It begins on a right-side sidewalk within a grey concrete corridor, moving past overhead ventilation pipes and passing cars under artificial lighting. As the camera progresses deeper, it passes an illuminated emergency exit and metal grates before the concrete walls transition into a distinctive yellow paint marked with graffiti. The scene then shifts as the tunnel curves toward the exit, where the artificial overhead fixtures give way to the ambient glow of urban street lights. Finally, the enclosed space opens completely, revealing the illuminated city skyline as the camera reaches the threshold of the street.
